name: Black Cat Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla extract.
3. Gradually combine the flour, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, and salt with the butter mixture.
4. Form the dough into 1-1/2 inch balls.
5. Place the cookies on lightly greased baking sheets about 3 inches apart.
6. Insert a wooden stick into each cookie to form legs.
7. Flatten each cookie slightly using a glass dipped in sugar.
8. Pinch the top of each cookie to create ears for the cats.
9. Press two fork tines into each cookie to form whiskers.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10-12 minutes, or until the cookies are set and lightly browned.
11. Remove from the oven and immediately press candy corn candies for eyes and red-hot candies for noses onto the cooled cookies.
Serves: 12
Category: Dessert
Method: Baked
Time: Approximately 35 minutes
